description_long: This office building features a modern, rectilinear design with a prominent central glass facade flanked by solid, opaque sections. The front elevation showcases a series of horizontal window bands, likely indicating multiple floors, with the glass elements set within a recessed vertical channel. The side and rear elevations are largely solid, with minimal fenestration, emphasizing privacy and structural solidity. The building sits on a flat base, suggesting a ground-level plinth or entry platform. The overall color palette is dominated by light gray and white tones, with the glass elements providing a subtle contrast. The structure's clean lines and lack of ornamentation reflect a contemporary, utilitarian architectural approach.
description: A modern office building with a central glass facade and solid, light-colored sides, featuring horizontal window bands and a clean, rectilinear form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central glass facade with horizontal window bands and flanking solid sections.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid, windowless wall and the building's stepped profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuation of the horizontal window bands and the building's layered structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mostly solid wall and a glimpse of the building's base platform.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows, evenly spaced and aligned vertically within a central recessed section.
